race.comment: Pike sticks aboard WIN FOR BUSTER (3) and he's the one they have to beat. Won a trial and then resumed heavily bet beaten 1.5L over 1300m at Belmont. Has to drop back 200m but draws inside and the blinkers go on for the first time. Has more to give and is sure to take tossing. MY TESTIMONY (8) is racing well and is close to a win. Has the pace and draw to take up a good early position and should be right in it. MANDIBLE MAGIC (9) missed by 1L resuming over 1000m at Belmont on the same day. Had trialled well and is further improved. Has an awkward gate but keeps the handy 3kg claim and can make the finish again. GODLESS STORM (1) resumes and has filled a minor placing at both first-up runs. Was plain the latest but threatened a win in all three prior. The debutants demand a betting watch, especially CACHACA (5), drawn low with Chris Parnham in the saddle.
